docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BLANK, NATASHA DBA  HUSKER RENTAL GUIDE AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKMASTER, CEO, JIM CRAIGLIST, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
